nodes.name: Streak-breasted honeyeater
nodes.summary: Streak-breasted honeyeater（Meliphaga reticulata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Streak-breasted honeyeater。

nodes.name: Streak-breasted honeyeater
nodes.summary: The streak-breasted honeyeater or streaky-breasted honeyeater (Meliphaga reticulata) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is found on Timor island. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest, subtropical or tropical mangrove forest, and subtropical or tropical moist montane forest. References

nodes.name: Meliphaga
nodes.summary: Meliphaga（Meliphaga）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联17种鸟类，如Puff-backed honeyeater、Yellow-spotted honeyeater、Lewin's honeyeater等17种鸟类。
